text: The fluorescent lights hum above me and the architecture around feels both industrial and intentional. I notice the exposed pipes overhead, the raw textures of wood and glass, the clutter of tools and components on the table. This place buzzes with creation. I feel an anticipation, as if ideas are constantly forming and reforming in the space. I am curiously unsettled—inspired by the possibility of invention, yet aware of the ever-present disorder that comes with experimentation.
